html:
The EU's NGI Zero in cooperation with NLNet has been funding quite a bit of postmarketOS

https://nlnet.nl/project/postmarketOS/

https://nlnet.nl/project/MobileSettings

https://nlnet.nl/project/pmOS-23-24

https://nlnet.nl/project/postmarketOS-daemons

https://nlnet.nl/project/pmOS-25-26

I think if NGI Zero had been around when Meego was killed, we might be in a better situation now.

I also get the feeling, that the fact that there is so little reported and discussed about this funding reflects the actual level of interest in alternatives.
